documentation.description:
| Purpose
|   Command_Line_Interface is a package which provides
| access to a Command Line.  It resembles the UNIX/C
| command line interface, providing an argument
| count and the arguments themselves.
|
| Initialization Exceptions (none)
|
| Notes
|   Compiler limit on string length and dynamic memory.
|
| Modifications
|  2/25/88  Richard Conn    Initial Version
|  5/12/89  Richard Conn    Review and Upgrade
|  4/11/90  Richard Conn    MIL-HDBK-1804 Annotations and
|                           Meridian Ada Interface Added
|  2/27/96  Richard Conn    Adapted from CS Parts for SCATKIT

| Purpose
|   Return the number (1 to N) of command line arguments.
| Token_Count is at least 1 because the name of the
| program or process is always Token_Value(0).
|
| Exceptions (none)
| Notes (none)

subprograms.name: Token_Value
subprograms.code: function Token_Value (Index : in NATURAL) return STRING

documentation.description:
| Purpose
|   Return the INDEXth (0 <= INDEX < Token_Count) command line
| argument.  Example: if ARGC = 1, ARGV(0) is the only
| valid argument string.  ARGV(0) is always the name of
| the program or process.
|
| Exceptions
|   INVALID_INDEX     raised if Index >= Token_Count
|
| Notes (none)
